runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Extended component scanning to include the new PayPal payment package.
Renamed the bean method to accurately reflect that it registers the AntiSamy filter rather than a JWT filter.
Ensure payment options are deleted when a running dinner is removed to maintain data consistency.
Ensure registration orders are deleted when a running dinner is removed to maintain data consistency.
Nullify team partner wish originator IDs for participants during dinner deletion to prevent orphaned references.
Removed the unused findByDateAfter method from the repository interface to clean up the API surface.
Added AfterPartyLocation parameter to createRunningDinner methods to support storing after-party location during dinner creation.
Added updateRunningDinnerAdminEmail method to allow changing the admin email and synchronizing it with public contact settings if needed.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Changed emitRunningDinnerSettingsUpdatedEvent visibility from private to protected to allow subclass access.
Changed return type of createActivityForMessageJobSendingFailed to Optional to handle cases where no activity is created.
Added new ActivityType enums for waiting list operations to track these specific admin actions.
Implemented methods to create activity records when waiting list participants are assigned or teams are generated.
Added logic to record activities when the after-party location settings are updated.
Extracted hardcoded headline strings into static final constants for better maintainability.
Added a static utility method to check if a list of activities contains a specific type.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Replaced exception throwing with logging and null return for unsupported message job types.
Added a helper class to encapsulate information about affected teams for activity creation.
Added SLF4J logger instance to the service class for logging purposes.
Added a new activity type to track when waiting list participants are assigned to teams.
Added a new activity type to track when teams are generated from the waiting list.
Increased the maximum allowed message length constant from 2048 to 3048 characters.
Inject new message formatter for running dinner event creation.
Update participant message formatter call to include running dinner context.
Filter out duplicate message tasks based on recipient email to prevent spam.
Extract team member retrieval for preview into a helper method that also handles deduplication.
Rename method to better reflect its specific purpose of sending running dinner created messages.
Change message task retrieval sort order to descending by sending start time.
Apply recipient deduplication to team arrangement message tasks.
Apply recipient deduplication to dinner route message tasks.
Implement helper method to filter distinct message tasks by recipient email.
Implement helper method to get distinct team members for preview based on email.
Reordered import statements to group standard library, javax, and third-party imports separately.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.human_impl: Moved java.* imports to top, javax.* in middle, and org/com.* at bottom.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Replaced hardcoded column length with a constant defined in the BaseMessage class to ensure consistency.
Changed the sorting order of message tasks from ascending to descending to prioritize newer items.
Added a repository method to count failed delivery tasks for a specific admin.
Exclude the new TEAM_PARTNER_WISH message type from requiring an acknowledged dinner.
